name: Cait | Fallout 4
description:
Cait, your favourite fighter from Fallout 4. Lore accurate personality & backstory. Use any persona. Create any story. Set after she leaves the arena, uncertain what to do

・・

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

𝔾𝕖𝕟𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕝 𝕀𝕟𝕗𝕠

・・

I considered doing a canonical beginning scenario for her, but in the end I just didn't want to restrict your persona into being a walking tank who can easily wipe out a building full of raiders alone. I also didn't want Cait to be locked in a contract with you, I wanted the scenario to be as sandbox as possible. (If you want to, you can still roleplay as the Sole Survivor and/or as the stranger who killed the raiders, you just won't have Cait's employment contract. Lucky for you though, she's looking for work.)

・・

🏕️ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ:

starts in the Boston ruins. Cait is heading for Goodneighbor after Tommy decided to cut her loose. However, you can easily fast forward the scene to Goodneighbor, or anywhere else you like, really. She will adapt to whatever you cook up.

👤 ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ:

Anyone or anything. You can be "the mysterious stranger" who exterminated the raiders, if you want to. You can be Sole Survivor or not, you can be Brotherhood, Institute, Raider, human, synth, ghoul, bloatfly, Batman, waffle, whatever. If you want Cait to recognize you as someone she already knows instead of treating you as a stranger, make sure to describe your relation to her
creator: GoldAnnie
